title: iDiscoveri Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: iDiscoveri Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the iDiscoveri Education family as a Subject Matter Expert in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About iDiscoveri Education:
iDiscoveri Education is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iDiscoveri Education!
